title: P2: format_ipv6 snprintf return value ignored
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c:313,318,376 etc - format_ipv6 calls snprintf but return value (potential truncation or error) is ignored in multiple call sites. Could lead to unterminated or invalid IPv6 string in CBOR. Should check ret >=0 && ret < buf_size. codereview
